herbs.herb_desc: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a medicinal herb often used to make a soothing and calming infusion. The infusion of yarrow flowers is traditionally used to ease menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and promote relaxation, making it a popular remedy for women's health issues. Additionally, yarrow infusion has antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and support overall well-being.
